opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My thighs and shoulders ache so badly I can't even stand up from the toilet, and I feel like I've run a marathon.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: About a week of severe, worsening aching and weakness in both thighs, buttocks and shoulders, now so bad he needs his wife to help him get out of a chair.

symptom_narrative.onset: gradually over the past week; the muscle problems themselves started roughly four weeks after a medication dose was changed
symptom_narrative.duration: about a week of aching and weakness, getting worse
symptom_narrative.character: symmetrical aching, heaviness and cramping in the large muscles with a feeling of profound weakness, like having run a marathon
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: severe and debilitating - can't stand up from the toilet or a chair without help
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: both thighs, buttocks and shoulders (the big muscles); symmetrical on both sides
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: present most of the time, worse with any exertion
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: resting; nothing really takes it away
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: even small efforts like walking to the kitchen or standing up
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: profound muscle heaviness and weakness; denies dark or tea-coloured urine; denies pins and needles, numbness or problems with the bladder or bowels
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: now needs his wife's help for all transfers (bed to chair, on and off the toilet); frightened of falling

past_medical_history.how_managed: takes a cholesterol tablet (atorvastatin), the dose of which was recently increased by the heart specialist

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: recently increased / doubled to a high dose

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives with his spouse, who is helping him move around; high fall risk because his legs are so weak; currently stuck resting in a low, soft sofa he struggles to rise from

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: frightened of losing his mobility and independence and of falling

communication_style.typical_message_style: describes the muscle pain and the recent medication change clearly

objective_data_offered.value: urine looks clear/normal yellow, not dark or tea-coloured
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient's visual impression only; does not exclude myoglobinuria, which needs a urine dipstick and a blood CK
